title: Early morning cake pickup for Vineyard and Box Hill families
summary:
Need a custom cake before a 7am shift near Vineyard? Riverstone Shopping Centre opens at 6am on weekdays — and so do we.

Custom eggless cakes, no exceptions on the eggless promise. Six sizes, 15 flavours, any design sent through on WhatsApp. Free parking right outside Shop 8, so pickup takes minutes, not a diversion from your morning.

48 hours minimum notice. That's what fresh baking actually takes — not a delay, a decision.

Serving Vineyard, Box Hill, Rouse Hill and Riverstone since December 2024.

Order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725.
keywords: custom eggless cake pickup before work
cake pickup before 7am shift near Vineyard
